clean_story:
Now I will teach you Bicycle.

Take two big sticks, strong like spear shafts—put one after other, same-long. Bind round rocks to middle so they spin fast when pushed. Sit on flat hide stretched between them, hold tight. Push with feet on ground to make rocks turn—faster you push, faster you go, no run. Steer front stick left-right like throwing spear, but keep body still or fall hard. Two spinning rocks, sit-high, move-swift without tired feet: Bicycle.
